heading: Budget and audit provisions of Government corporation control law applicable
label: 2293 Budget and audit provisions of Government corporation control law applicable
text: The budget and audit provisions of chapter 91 of title 31 shall be applicable to the Federal Financing Bank in the same manner as they are applied to the wholly owned Government corporations named in .section 9101(3) of title 31
